title: Requirement
description: Requirement: Object representing a single, condition-based requirement to run against each object in a set filtered based on Specification.ExtractionAlso contains the config required to represent the verification results in a human friendly form.

Clause.description: Human readable identifier to reference the Requirement.

Source.description: Source material for this Requirement. E.g. Codes, best practices, guidelines, etc.

FailureMessage.description: General, human-readable message explaining what does the failure mean to the user.

Severity.description: Severity of Requirement failure, originating from the concept that not all conditions are necessarily errors. FailureSeverity: Specifies severity of a requirement failure.

Condition.description: Condition to be met for an object to pass a Requirement. ICondition: Top level interface for conditions: lightweight objects describing a yes/no question to be asked against another object.

ReportingConfig.description: Reporting config containing settings needed to present the verification results in a human friendly form. IConditionReportingConfig: Top interface for all condition reporting config objects.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
